text_block_list.text:
On our way back from an excursion, Seiun Sky
and I spot King Halo petting a stray cat.

text_block_list.name: White Cat
text_block_list.text: Mew! Purr, purr...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Wooow, that kitty sure likes you, King.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! But of course! A true king is adored by
feline subjects as well!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
And Beatrix here is particularly clever! She
immediately trusted me enough to let me pet her!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
"Beatrix," huh? Hehe. I see you've gone and
picked out another fine name.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hola, Leo! You're lookin' lively today!

text_block_list.name: White Cat
text_block_list.text: Meow.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hm?! L-Leo?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Uh oh, now we've got El calling the kitty
something else. Well, I guess this tends to happen
with stray cats.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... El! I'll thank you not to refer to my Beatrix
by some random name!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Qué?! Who's "Beatrix"?! This little gato's name is
Leo!

text_block_list.name: White Cat
text_block_list.text: Meow?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: See?! He just replied to me!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Grrr... I won't accept this! Her proper name is
Beatrix!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Come on now, don't go getting so worked up. We
don't want the kitty getting stressed, do we?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I've got an idea! How about you both call out to
the cat at the same time?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I think it'll head for whoever it feels closest to.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oooh, that'll lay things out real clear! Let's do iiit!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I accept your challenge! My kitten is loyal to me
and no one else!

And so the contest begins... but the result isn't
very clear.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Leo! Leo! Over here, mi gatito!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Beatrix! Remember the day we first met!

text_block_list.name: White Cat
text_block_list.text: Meooow...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Sigh... They're being so noisy. This won't end well. Unless...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Over here, Frosty.

text_block_list.name: White Cat
text_block_list.text: Meoow. ♪

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What?! But why, Beatrix?! Why go to Sky?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Heh. Actually, this little one's my buddy. ♪ We've
known each other since I first started at the
academy.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Noooo! Leo! What about all those times we
played together?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Arrrgh... Oh, Beatrix! If only we'd become
acquainted sooner!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hehehe... Guess this means I won!
choice_data_list: That cat really seems to like you.
That cat really seems to like you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hehehe... Guess this means I won!
choice_data_list: That cat really seems to like you.
That cat really seems to like you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, sure seems like it, don't it? ♪ It took quite
a while for Frosty to warm up to me, though.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
First, when you want to touch a cat, you can't
force it. Instead, you gotta act like you're making
an offering...

text_block_list.name: White Cat
text_block_list.text: Meooow. ♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Wha?! He rolled onto his back!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Now you know he's fine with you rubbing his
belly. So we've gotta give him the best petting of
his life!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You're best off going nice and steady, like this.
Go ahead, try it out!

And so, Professor Seiun Sky educates the three of
us with a lecture in "Cat Petting 101"...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hm, let's leave that up to the kitty. Why don't we
ask first?

Following Sky's instructions, I hold out my hand...
The cat sniffs at my fingers, then turns away.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh! That means he trusts you! He might just end
up letting you pet him one day.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ooh! Sei, you're a true expert!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Tch. I'll show you all how it's done by taking my
rightful place as king of this kitten's heart!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You think you've got what it takes to compete
with yours truly? Heh...
